steps.title: How it Works
steps.subtitle: Getting your government benefits shouldn't be a struggle. Follow these three simple steps.
steps.step1Desc: Use our smart search to find policies that match your needs and eligibility.
steps.step2Desc: Read the simple requirements and document list to see if you qualify.
steps.step3Desc: Follow our step-by-step guide to apply on the official government portal.

policies.title: Government Policies & Schemes
policies.subtitle: Browse our comprehensive database of government initiatives. Filter by category or search to find exactly what you need.
policies.noResultsDesc: Try adjusting your search or category filter.

pm-kisan.name: PM Kisan Samman Nidhi
pm-kisan.description: A central sector scheme that provides income support to all landholding farmers' families in the country to supplement their financial needs.
pm-kisan.eligibility: All landholding farmers' families (subject to certain exclusion criteria).
applicationProcess: Visit the official PM Kisan portal.
Click on 'New Farmer Registration'.
Enter Aadhaar number and fill the application form.
Upload required documents and submit.

ayushman-bharat.name: Ayushman Bharat (PM-JAY)
ayushman-bharat.description: The world's largest health insurance scheme, providing a health cover of Rs. 5 lakhs per family per year for secondary and tertiary care hospitalization.
ayushman-bharat.eligibility: Families identified by the SECC 2011 data based on occupational and deprivation criteria.
applicationProcess: Check eligibility on the PM-JAY website.
Visit an empanelled hospital with required ID proofs.
The hospital will verify your identity and provide treatment.
No cash payment is required at the hospital.

sukanya-samriddhi.name: Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana
sukanya-samriddhi.description: A small deposit scheme for the girl child, launched as a part of the 'Beti Bachao Beti Padhao' campaign, offering high interest rates and tax benefits.
sukanya-samriddhi.eligibility: Parents or legal guardians of a girl child below 10 years.
applicationProcess: Visit any post office or authorized bank branch.
Fill the Sukanya Samriddhi Account opening form.
Submit the form with the birth certificate and ID proofs.
Make the initial deposit.

pm-awas-yojana.name: Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana (PMAY)
pm-awas-yojana.description: An initiative to provide affordable housing to the urban and rural poor with a target of building 2 crore affordable houses.
pm-awas-yojana.eligibility: Families with no pucca house, belonging to EWS, LIG, or MIG categories.
applicationProcess: Visit the official PMAY portal.
Select 'Citizen Assessment' and choose the appropriate category.
Fill in the Aadhaar details and application form.
Save and submit the application.

pm-mudra-yojana.name: PM Mudra Yojana (PMMY)
pm-mudra-yojana.description: Provides loans up to 10 lakh to non-corporate, non-farm small/micro enterprises to help them start or expand their business.
pm-mudra-yojana.eligibility: Any Indian citizen who has a business plan for a non-farm sector income generating activity.
applicationProcess: Prepare a business plan.
Visit a nearby bank, NBFC, or MFI.
Fill the Mudra loan application form.
Submit the form with required documents.

atal-pension-yojana.name: Atal Pension Yojana (APY)
atal-pension-yojana.description: A pension scheme focused on the unorganized sector, providing a guaranteed minimum pension of Rs. 1,000 to Rs. 5,000 per month after the age of 60.
atal-pension-yojana.eligibility: Any Indian citizen between 18 and 40 years having a savings bank account.
applicationProcess: Visit the bank where you have a savings account.
Fill the APY registration form.
Provide Aadhaar and mobile number.
Ensure sufficient balance for auto-debit of contributions.

pm-poshan.name: PM POSHAN (Mid-Day Meal)
pm-poshan.description: Provides hot cooked meals to children in government and government-aided schools to improve their nutritional status and encourage school attendance.
pm-poshan.eligibility: Children studying in classes I to VIII in government and government-aided schools.
applicationProcess: Automatic enrollment for children attending government schools.
No separate application required by parents.

digital-india-scholarship.name: National Scholarship Portal (NSP)
digital-india-scholarship.description: A one-stop solution for various scholarship schemes offered by Central and State governments for students from class 1 to Ph.D.
digital-india-scholarship.eligibility: Students belonging to SC, ST, OBC, Minority, or EWS categories (varies by specific scholarship).
applicationProcess: Register on the National Scholarship Portal.
Login and fill the application form for the eligible scheme.
Upload required documents.
Submit and track the application status.

pm-jan-dhan-yojana.name: PM Jan Dhan Yojana (PMJDY)
pm-jan-dhan-yojana.description: A national mission for financial inclusion to ensure access to financial services, namely, basic savings & deposit accounts, remittance, credit, insurance, and pension.
pm-jan-dhan-yojana.eligibility: Any Indian citizen who does not have a bank account.
applicationProcess: Visit any bank branch or Bank Mitr outlet.
Fill the account opening form.
Submit the form with ID and address proof.
Receive the RuPay debit card.

pm-vaya-vandana.name: PM Vaya Vandana Yojana
pm-vaya-vandana.description: A pension scheme exclusively for senior citizens aged 60 years and above, offering a guaranteed rate of return for 10 years.
pm-vaya-vandana.eligibility: Senior citizens aged 60 years and above.
applicationProcess: Visit the LIC website or any LIC branch.
Fill the application form for PMVVY.
Submit the form with the investment amount.
Choose the frequency of pension payment (Monthly/Quarterly/Half-yearly/Yearly).

digital.title: Digital Literacy Guide
digital.subtitle: New to online applications? Don't worry. Our step-by-step guides will help you navigate the digital world of government services with confidence.
digital.videoTitle: Visual Learning: How to Apply Online
digital.videoDesc: Sometimes seeing is better than reading. Watch our comprehensive video guide that covers everything from registration to final submission.
digital.faqSubtitle: Quick answers to help you get started.
digital.resourcesSubtitle: Explore these official government platforms for more digital training and information.
digital.guide1Desc: Learn how to navigate official websites, create accounts, and find the right application forms.
digital.guide2Desc: Step-by-step guide on scanning, resizing, and uploading your ID proofs and certificates safely.
digital.guide3Desc: How to identify official websites and protect your personal information from online scams.
digital.faq1Q: How do I know if a website is official?
digital.faq1A: Official Indian government websites usually end with .gov.in or .nic.in. Always look for the 'https://' and a lock icon in the address bar.
digital.faq2Q: What if I don't have a scanner?
digital.faq2A: You can use mobile apps like Adobe Scan or Microsoft Lens to take clear photos of your documents and convert them to PDF.
digital.faq3Q: Is it safe to share my Aadhaar number?
digital.faq3A: Only share your Aadhaar number on official government portals. Never share it over WhatsApp, email, or with unknown persons.

about.missionTitle: Bridging the Gap Between Citizens & Government
about.missionDesc: PolicyBridge was founded with a simple yet powerful goal: to ensure that no citizen is left behind due to a lack of information or digital skills. We act as a transparent bridge, translating complex government policies into actionable knowledge.
about.valuesSubtitle: Our core values drive everything we do, from how we research policies to how we design our interface.
about.value1Desc: We break down complex legal jargon into simple, everyday language that anyone can understand.
about.value2Desc: We provide direct links to official sources and clearly state eligibility and charges for every policy.
about.value3Desc: Our platform is designed to be usable by everyone, regardless of their digital literacy or device.
about.awarenessDesc: Millions of dollars in government benefits go unclaimed every year simply because people don't know they exist or don't know how to apply. We are changing that.
about.awarenessPoint3: Speeds up the digital transformation of India.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: Have questions about a policy or need help with the platform? Our team is here to support you.
contact.infoDesc: Reach out to us through any of these channels. We typically respond within 24-48 hours.
contact.communityDesc: Join our community forum to discuss policies with other citizens and experts.
contact.successDesc: Thank you for reaching out. We have received your message and will get back to you shortly.
